price: A la carte pricing for each dish
hours: Lunch and Dinner (specific times vary by ship and itinerary)
dress_code: Resort Casual (no tank tops or flip-flops for men)
reservations: Recommended, walk-ins accepted if space available
cuisine_type: Global Cuisine (Asian fusion, Latin American, Mediterranean, etc.), small plates for sharing
what_makes_it_unique: Food Republic offers a global culinary journey with small, shareable plates, allowing guests to sample diverse flavors from around the world. Guests order interactively using tablets, providing a modern and flexible dining experience.
